aboutPage.bioP1: I'm a creator, a programmer, and a thinker. I love building things from scratch — whether it's a painting, a piece of code, or a deep-dive essay.
aboutPage.bioP2: For the longest time, the biggest obstacle to this passion was my own brain: I have ADHD. After trying nearly every productivity tool on the market, I realized they were all designed for a neurotypical mind. I needed a "partner" — something that understood me and could give me a gentle nudge right when I needed it most.
aboutPage.bioP3: I couldn't find it anywhere. So I decided to build it myself — for me, and for the millions of others with a "busy brain" just like mine. That's how Dopamind was born.
aboutPage.artworksText: I post my artworks at philoart.io/philo
aboutPage.artworksContactText: To purchase original paintings or photography prints, DM on X or email philo.li.official@gmail.com

ebookTranslator.title: Free Ebook Translator
ebookTranslator.subtitle: Upload an EPUB or PDF, bring your own LLM API key, and get back a bilingual edition with the original and translated text interleaved paragraph by paragraph. The file is parsed entirely in your browser — your book never touches any server.

settings.apiKeyHint: Get one at {link}. Your key is sent only to {provider}, never to philoli.com.
settings.rememberKey: Remember key in this browser only (localStorage). Uncheck for shared devices.
settings.customEndpointHint: Full URL to an OpenAI-compatible /chat/completions endpoint. Must be https:// and reachable on the public internet.
settings.needApiKey: Enter an API key to continue.

upload.parsingPdf: Parsing PDF — extracting text and reconstructing paragraphs…
upload.dropTitle: Drop an EPUB or PDF here
upload.dropSubtitle: or click to choose a file
upload.noChapters: No readable chapters found in this file.
upload.scannedPdfDetected: {file} is a scanned PDF ({pages} pages) with no text layer.
upload.modelLacksVision: Your selected {provider} model "{model}" doesn't accept image input, so it can't OCR scanned pages.
upload.providerHasNoVision: {provider} doesn't offer a vision-capable model in this picker. Open Settings to switch provider (Gemini, OpenAI, or Claude all support OCR).
upload.deleteConfirm: Remove "{name}" from history? The file and its translations will be deleted.

preview.willTranslate: Text extracted. Continue to pick chapters to translate.

singlePage.tooltip: OCR + translate just this page so you can preview the quality before committing to the whole book.
singlePage.empty: No translatable text found on this page.
singlePage.needsVision: The current model can't OCR images. Switch to a vision-capable model first.

browse.errorOne: {count} paragraph failed. You can re-translate to retry — already-done paragraphs are skipped.
browse.errorMany: {count} paragraphs failed. You can re-translate to retry — already-done paragraphs are skipped.
browse.noTranslatableText: This chapter has no translatable text (cover, front matter, etc).

glossary.label: Glossary
glossary.title: Force specific translations for terms in this book — useful for technical, professional, or domain-specific works.
glossary.hint: CSV with two columns: source term, translation. Optional third column: note. First row may be a header. UTF-8.
glossary.deleteConfirm: Remove the glossary "{name}"? Any books using it will fall back to no glossary.

metadata.title: 3D Rubik's Cube — Philo Li
metadata.description: Interactive 3D Rubik's Cube. Set a scramble and a solution, play step by step, hide colors or faces for memorization drills.

rubiksCube.title: 3D Rubik's Cube
rubiksCube.intro: Type a scramble and a solution. Step through the solve, drag to rotate the view, and use learning mode to drill algorithm cases.

gif.errorGeneric: Failed to generate GIF. Please try again.
gif.needSteps: Add some solution steps before exporting a GIF.
gif.sceneNotReady: The cube is still loading. Try again in a moment.

customHide.title: Custom hide / highlight
customHide.instructions: Click any sticker to cycle: visible → hidden → highlighted → visible.

legend.letterDesc: the layer to turn (default is clockwise 90°, viewed from facing that face)

methods.sectionCaption: Step through common solving methods stage by stage — each thumbnail hides everything except the cubies placed by that point.
methods.title: Solving methods

lbl.name: Layer-by-Layer (LBL)
lbl.description: Classic beginner method. Solve one layer at a time — bottom cross, bottom corners, middle edges, then last layer.

cfop.name: CFOP (Fridrich)
cfop.description: Mainstream speedsolving method. Cross builds the bottom cross, F2L pairs corners with middle edges, OLL orients the last face, PLL permutes the last layer.

roux.name: Roux
roux.description: Block-building method. Build a 1×2×3 block on the left, then on the right, solve the last-layer corners (CMLL), then finish with the M-slice and last six edges (LSE).
